Class ProductServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
com.gcu.inventoryapp.service.impl.ProductServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
ProductService
@Service public class ProductServiceImpl extends Object implements ProductService
Service implementation responsible for handling product-related business logic. Provides operations for retrieving, saving, and safely deleting products.

    Deletes a product by ID if it is not associated with inventory or order items.

  • Constructor Details

    • ProductServiceImpl

      public ProductServiceImpl(ProductRepository productRepository, InventoryRepository inventoryRepository, OrderItemRepository orderItemRepository)
      Constructor for ProductServiceImpl.
      Parameters:
      productRepository - repository used to access product data
      inventoryRepository - repository used to check inventory relationships
      orderItemRepository - repository used to check order item relationships

  • Method Details

    • getAllProducts

      public List<Product> getAllProducts()
      Retrieves all products from the database.
      Specified by:
      getAllProducts in interface ProductService
      Returns:
      a list of all products

    • getProductById

      public Optional<Product> getProductById(Long id)
      Retrieves a product by its ID.
      Specified by:
      getProductById in interface ProductService
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the product
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the product if found, otherwise empty

    • saveProduct

      public Product saveProduct(Product product)
      Saves a new or existing product to the database.
      Specified by:
      saveProduct in interface ProductService
      Parameters:
      product - the product to save
      Returns:
      the saved product with updated ID

    • deleteProduct

      public boolean deleteProduct(Long id)
      Deletes a product by ID if it is not associated with inventory or order items.
      Specified by:
      deleteProduct in interface ProductService
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the product to delete
      Returns:
      true if the product was successfully deleted, false if it is linked to other records
